series_metadata.series_description: Reports are compiled at the end of the month or quarter for VR Administration to assist in managing fiscal resources. Records may include: Authorization Summary, Case Service Spending and vouchered reports. These reports are used as a tool to compare case spending.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) federal fiscal years from the fiscal year generated. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) federal fiscal years from the fiscal year generated., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
